data.title: FBI Warns Of Ongoing China-Backed Telecom Hacks: Here's Why Encrypted Messaging Could Be Your Last Line Of Defense
data.description: The FBI and CISA are urging Americans to adopt encrypted messaging apps following a major China-backed cyberattack on U.S. telecom giants, highlighting encryption as a critical defense against espionage targeting sensitive communications.

data.title: Elon Musk Lauds Ro Khanna, Calls Him A 'Sensible Moderate' After California Democrat Calls Out Gavin Newsom's Exclusion Of Tesla From EV Credit Policy
data.description: Tesla CEO Elon Musk appreciated support from Congressman Ro Khanna, who voiced his disapproval of Governor Gavin Newsom's electric vehicle subsidy plan.

data.title: Why Verint Systems Shares Are Trading Higher By Around 23%; Here Are 20 Stocks Moving Premarket
US Stocks Likely To See Tepid Opening As Bitcoin Blasts Through $103,000: Investors Eye Jobless Claims Data While BlackRock Expects 'US Exceptionalism' To Power Earnings In 2025
data.description: U.S. stocks could open on a weak note on Thursday after the averages closed at a record high on Wednesday. Futures of all three major indices were marginally down on Thursday, pointing to cautious sentiment on Wall Street.

data.title: As Bitcoin Hits $100K For The First Time, Ark Invest's Cathie Wood Calls It 'A Much Bigger Idea Than Gold' And That It Is 'Still Is In Early Innings'
data.description: As Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) crossed the $100,000 mark for the first time, Cathie Wood on Thursday said Ark Invest “believes Bitcoin is a much bigger idea than gold
